info.name: Lenovo — SOM Timeline Classification (US 3.4.1)
info.description:
End-to-end Postman for **US 3.4.1 — Timeline Classification & Canonical Sales Clock**.

**Prereqs**
1. `uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000` (v0.23.0+)
2. Migrations:
   - `sql/2026_10_som_interview_setup.sql`
   - `sql/2026_11_som_organizational_intent.sql`
   - `sql/2026_12_som_timeline_classification.sql`
3. All 6 organizational intent cards CONFIGURED (section gate)

**Variables:** `d365BaseUrl`, `adminUserId`

body.raw:
{
  "confirmAgentImpact": true,
  "fields": {
    "week1to4": {"dominantActivity": "Pipeline creation", "kpiTarget": "45% of new quarterly opportunities created", "agentInterpretationNote": "Early-quarter prospecting signals are expected"},
    "week5to8": {"dominantActivity": "Qualification and solutioning", "kpiTarget": "60% stage progression", "agentInterpretationNote": "Mid-quarter validation activity should dominate"},
    "week9to12": {"dominantActivity": "Negotiation and closure", "kpiTarget": "75% commit protection", "agentInterpretationNote": "Late-quarter closure motion outweighs new pipeline"},
    "globalAgentInterpretationRule": "Agents interpret identical signals differently by week context",
    "q1": {"quarterCharacter": "Foundation quarter", "annualKpiContribution": "20% of annual new logo target", "agentInterpretationNote": "Lenient interpretation of early pipeline build"},
    "q2": {"quarterCharacter": "Growth quarter", "annualKpiContribution": "25% of annual revenue target", "agentInterpretationNote": "Expect progression from Q1 pipeline"},
    "q3": {"quarterCharacter": "Harvest quarter", "annualKpiContribution": "30% of annual revenue target", "agentInterpretationNote": "Closure and commit protection are primary"},
    "q4": {"quarterCharacter": "Closure and reset quarter", "annualKpiContribution": "25% of annual revenue target", "agentInterpretationNote": "Renewed prospecting in Q4 is a recovery signal"},
    "crossQuarterCarryoverRule": "Negotiation-stage deals carry forward without restarting the week clock",
    "globalYearlyInterpretationRule": "Compare pace against prior quarter week-band benchmark"
  }
}
